product.name: Google: Custom Product
product.description: Use to indicate whether or not the unique product identifiers (UPIs) GTIN, MPN, and brand are available for your product.

product.name: Color
product.description: Defines the primary color or pattern, such as blue or striped

product.name: Backrest type
product.description: Specifies the material or style of a chair's backrest; e.g. mesh, padded

product.name: Seat type
product.description: Describes the design of a chair or bench seat, such as padded or bucket

product.name: Upholstery material
product.description: Identifies the fabric used for upholstery, such as leather or velvet

product.name: Furniture/Fixture material
product.description: Identifies the main material used in furniture or fixtures, like wood or metal

product.name: Firmness
product.description: Defines the level of firmness in items like furniture or mattresses, e.g. extra soft, firm

product.name: Barware material
product.description: Identifies the main material used in barware items, such as glass or stainless steel

product.name: Shape
product.description: Describes the geometric form or shape of a product, such as round or heart

product.name: Decoration material
product.description: Identifies the material used for decoration, such as sequins or feathers

product.name: Material
product.description: Defines a product's primary material, such as cotton or wool

product.name: Tableware material
product.description: Specifies the composition of tableware, such as bone china or earthenware

product.name: Dinnerware pieces included
product.description: Defines the components of a dinnerware collection, such as dinner plates or serving bowl

product.description: List of search queries for which a product gets higher rank in search results

product.name: Related products
product.description: List of related products

product.name: Related products settings
product.description: Determines how related products are displayed along with algorithmic product recommendations

product.name: Complementary products
product.description: List of complementary products

product.name: Tabletop color
product.description: Specifies the color of a table's top surface, such as black or white

product.name: Tabletop material
product.description: Identifies the composition of the tabletop surface, e.g. plywood, concrete

product.name: Tabletop shape
product.description: Describes the geometric shape of a table's top, e.g. square, kidney-shaped

product.name: Chair features
product.description: Highlights special functions of a chair, such as massage function or power reclining

product.name: Leg material
product.description: Specifies the material used for the legs of a product, such as cherry wood or bamboo

product.name: Leg color
product.description: Defines the hue of a product's legs, e.g. white, brown

product.name: Frame style
product.description: Describes the design or type of frame for artwork, such as modern or rustic

product.name: Artwork authenticity
product.description: Indicates the authenticity of the artwork, specifying whether it is an original creation or a reproduction

product.name: Theme
product.description: Describes the product's primary theme or motif, such as sport, space, or holidays

product.name: Artwork frame material
product.description: Identifies the material used in art frames, such as wood or gold-plated

product.name: Art movement
product.description: Defines the stylistic approach or art movement of a painting, e.g. Impressionism, Expressionism

product.name: Painting medium
product.description: Indicates the primary material or technique used in a painting, e.g. acrylic, oil

product.name: Seat structure
product.description: Defines the construction of a seat, e.g. wicker, solid

product.name: Furniture/Fixture features
product.description: Highlights special characteristics of furniture or fixtures, like adjustable shelves or built-in mirror

product.name: Kitchen/Dining furniture items included
product.description: Identifies the specific furniture pieces included in a set, like dining chairs or kitchen island

product.name: Back type
product.description: Defines the style of back support on seating, such as backless or low back

product.name: Vase shape
product.description: Describes the geometric or organic form of a vase, such as round or bottle

product.name: Filler material
product.description: Identifies the type of material used to fill a product, typically pillows or cushions; e.g. memory foam, feathers

product.name: Cover material
product.description: Identifies the type of fabric or material used in the product's cover, such as silk or cotton

product.name: Cover color
product.description: Specifies the primary color of a product's cover, e.g. clear, navy

product.name: Throw pillow shape
product.description: Identifies the shape of decorative pillows, such as bolster or rectangular

product.name: Seat upholstery material
product.description: Defines the fabric or material used for sofa coverings, such as microfiber or leatherette

product.name: Seat upholstery color
product.description: Identifies the color of a furniture item's seat upholstery, such as beige or blue

product.name: Sofa features
product.description: Describes special characteristics of a sofa, such as adjustable armrests or pet friendly

product.name: Backrest upholstery material
product.description: Identifies the fabric type on the backrest of furniture, such as velvet or wicker

product.name: Backrest upholstery color
product.description: Identifies the color of the backrest upholstery on furniture, such as beige or blue

product.name: Fabric
product.description: Identifies the type of fabric used in a product, for example, cotton or denim

product.name: Care instructions
product.description: Provides guidance for product upkeep, such as hand wash or dry clean only

product.name: Light temperature
product.description: Defines the color characteristics of light sources, such as warm white or daylight

product.name: Frame material
product.description: Defines the material used in the product's frame, such as wood or plastic

product.name: Top color
product.description: Defines the primary color of a product's top surface, e.g. clear, bronze

product.name: Top material
product.description: Defines the material of a product's top surface, e.g. wood, glass

product.name: Upholstery color
product.description: Identifies the color of a product's upholstery, such as red or beige

product.name: Outdoor furniture items included
product.description: Identifies the specific items included in an outdoor furniture set, such as chairs or table

product.name: Frame color
product.description: Specifies the color of a product's frame, such as clear or gold

product.name: Mount/Stand features
product.description: Details the specific characteristics of a product's mount or stand, like adjustable angle or foldable
